import React from 'react'; import { Tab } from '@headlessui/react'; import { ArrowLeft, Send, Users, Eye, MoreVertical, ChevronDown } from 'lucide-react'; function classNames(...classes) { return classes.filter(Boolean).join(' '); } const UserDetails = ({ user, onBack }) => { const tabs = ['Activity', 'Schedule', 'Info']; if (!user) { return (
Select a user to view details
); } return (
{/* Header */}

User Details

{/* User Avatar and Info */}

{user.name}

{user.title} {user.department}

{/* Social Icons */}
{user.randomIcons && user.randomIcons.map((iconUrl, index) => ( ))}
{/* Message Input */}
{/* Tabs */} {tabs.map((tab) => ( classNames( 'w-full rounded-lg text-sm font-medium leading-5 h-7 flex items-center justify-center', 'ring-white ring-opacity-60 ring-offset-2 ring-offset-blue-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2', selected ? 'bg-neutral-800 text-white shadow' : 'text-neutral-400 hover:bg-white/[0.12] hover:text-white' ) } > {tab} ))} {/* Activity Content */}
{/* Primeira linha: Ícone, Título e Duração */}

Working on {user.skills[0]} project

2:30 PM - 5:00 PM

{/* Segunda linha: Descrição, Timestamp e Status alinhados ao ícone */}

Currently focused on {user.bio}

Started 30m • In Progress
{/* Primeira linha: Ícone, Título e Duração */}

Team Meeting - {user.department}

10:00 AM - 11:00 AM

{/* Segunda linha: Descrição, Timestamp e Status alinhados ao ícone */}

Weekly sync with the {user.department} team to discuss ongoing projects and priorities.

3h • Completed

Today's Schedule

Daily Standup 9:00 AM
{user.skills[0]} Review 2:00 PM
1:1 with Manager 4:00 PM

Contact Information

Email: {user.email}
Phone: {user.phone}
Location: {user.location}

Work Information

Department: {user.department}
Join Date: {new Date(user.joinDate).toLocaleDateString()}

Skills

{user.skills.map((skill, index) => ( {skill} ))}

Bio

{user.bio}
); }; export default UserDetails;
